description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the node:latest Docker image with mysql:latest, redis:latest, and postgres:latest services and a cache of node_modules/. Define the default test stage. Add a test_async job that runs npm install then node ./specs/start.js ./specs/async.spec.js. Add a test_db job that runs npm install then node ./specs/start.js ./specs/db-postgres.spec.js. Both jobs inherit the cache and run on any branch.
